word: G2415 - Ἱεροσολυμίτης - Hierosolymítēs - hee-er-os-ol-oo-mee'-tace - Of Jerusalem

sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἱεροσολυμίτης

- Transliteration: Hierosolumites

- Phonetic: hee-er-os-ol-oo-mee'-tace

- Definition:

1. a citizen or inhabitant of Jerusalem

- Origin: from G2414

- TDNT entry: 11:52,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G2414; a Hierosolymite that is inhabitant of Hierosolyma: - of Jerusalem.
